occurrence_sentence: To help companies succeed in the early stages of their development, we created the Bluefors Lab – a service providing easy and convenient access to a cryogenic measurement system for testing quantum hardware and software.

To help companies succeed in the early stages of their development, we created the Bluefors Lab – a service providing easy and convenient access to a cryogenic measurement system for testing quantum hardware and software.

interaction_phrase: The Bluefors Lab is based around our high-performing dilution refrigerator
occurrence_sentence: The Bluefors Lab is based around our high-performing dilution refrigerator, alongside a suite of measurement electronics designed to optimize workflows and make maximum use of the time available.

interaction_phrase: Experiments are carried out with consultation and support from Bluefors
occurrence_sentence: Experiments are carried out with consultation and support from Bluefors to better enable success by ensuring that the cryogenic measurement system operates as needed.

QuantrolOx – pioneers in the development of automated qubit control software to bring fast and reliable performance to superconducting and spin qubits – was one of the first companies to carry out experiments at the Bluefors Lab.

interaction_phrase: an integral part of QuantrolOx product development process
occurrence_sentence: Dr. Jelena Trbovic, QuantrolOx's Director of Business Development, says "Bluefors Delft Lab is an integral part of QuantrolOx product development process.
